test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Every behavior changed by the html:false->html:true flip in buildEditorExtensions: inline <a href> recovery, target/rel attribute handling, idempotency of the recovered link, javascript:-scheme drop (security), and the full browser save chain; plus no-regression of existing prose/frontmatter round-trip.
test_completeness.justification: Bug fix in the tiptap-markdown round-trip config. Each new behavior is unit-tested through the production code path (editor.commands.setContent + storage.markdown.getMarkdown) and the full open->review->save chain is exercised by a real-Chromium Playwright E2E (F0.5 web, 6 passed). Existing round-trip + editor coverage stays green.

behaviors.behavior: an inline <a href> link round-trips to a functional markdown link [text](url) instead of entity-escaped <a> text
behaviors.evidence: markdownTiptap.test.ts 'preserves an inline <a href> link instead of escaping it to <a> text' PASSED; E2E markdown-editor.spec.ts blog-file test asserts the PUT body contains [Shipwright](https://github.com/svenroth-ai/shipwright) and no <.

behaviors.behavior: an anchor carrying target/rel attributes keeps its href on save
behaviors.evidence: markdownTiptap.test.ts 'keeps the href intact when the anchor carries target/rel attributes' PASSED (output contains [Shipwright](https://shipwright.dev), no <).

behaviors.behavior: the recovered link round-trips idempotently (serialize-after-parse is a fixed point)
behaviors.evidence: markdownTiptap.test.ts 'round-trips the recovered link idempotently' PASSED.

behaviors.behavior: a javascript: scheme anchor is dropped to plain text and never written to disk (SAFE_LINK_PROTOCOLS)
behaviors.evidence: markdownTiptap.test.ts 'does NOT smuggle a javascript: scheme link back to disk' PASSED; this is also a security improvement over html:false, which left the escaped href in the file.

behaviors.behavior: the full browser save chain (open blog file -> Review diff -> Save) writes a functional markdown link in the PUT body
behaviors.evidence: F0.5 web: markdown-editor.spec.ts 'blog file: an inline <a href> Shipwright link saves as a markdown link, not corrupt <a> text' PASSED (Chromium, 6/6, exit 0).

behaviors.behavior: existing StarterKit prose + YAML frontmatter round-trip is unaffected by the html:true flip
behaviors.evidence: Pre-existing markdownTiptap round-trip + envelope suites (28 unit) and the 5 existing markdown-editor E2E tests all still PASS after the flip.
